name: Papra
compose:
name: slashnode-papra
services:
  server:
    image: ghcr.io/papra-hq/papra:26.5.0-rootless
    container_name: papra
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      AUTH_SECRET: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      APP_BASE_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:8112
    volumes:
      - server_data:/app/app-data
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8112:1221
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data:
    name: slashnode-papra_server_data
